name: Scala 3 Development
postStartCommand: sudo chown vscode:vscode /workspaces/scala3-devcontainer && if [ -d /workspaces/scala3-devcontainer/.git ]; then sudo chown -R vscode:vscode /workspaces/scala3-devcontainer/.git; fi && sudo mkdir -p /workspaces/scala3-devcontainer/.metals /workspaces/scala3-devcontainer/.bloop /workspaces/scala3-devcontainer/.bsp && sudo chown -R vscode:vscode /workspaces/scala3-devcontainer/.metals /workspaces/scala3-devcontainer/.bloop /workspaces/scala3-devcontainer/.bsp
postCreateCommand: node --version && npm --version && codex --version && scala3 -version && scala3-compiler -version && scala-cli --version && sbt update && sbt --version
